gist.headline: Keys to the hive
gist.blurb: We've given the chat interface a fresh coat of paint and smoothed out the rough edges. Plus, you can now bring your own Pollen key to keep the conversation flowing when you need more juice.
gist.summary: The chat app received a comprehensive UI/UX update, featuring a new 'Bring Your Own Pollen' (BYOP) modal for custom API keys, friendlier error messages, and layout fixes for mobile viewports.
gist.impact: Users will enjoy a smoother, glitch-free chat experience and can now easily plug in their own API keys to bypass free tier limits.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a shiny golden key (representing the BYOP API key) next to a retro computer monitor displaying clean chat bubbles. The monitor robot is happy to receive the key.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, handing a shiny golden key to a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The monitor displays clean, colorful chat bubbles. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, warm lighting, emotionally warm.
